infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: KANNI uses your location to show nearby produce, set farm/pickup points, and match delivery jobs.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: KANNI uses your location to show nearby produce, set farm/pickup points, and match delivery jobs.

plugins.photosPermission: KANNI needs photo access so you can add pictures of your produce.
plugins.cameraPermission: KANNI needs camera access so you can photograph your produce.
